challenges.title: Build a Salesforce Profile Card
challenges.summary: Practice HTML and JavaScript by rendering a small Salesforce candidate profile card.
challenges.instructions: Create a profile card with a heading, a skills list, and a button that updates the status text when clicked.
challenges.expectedBehavior: The preview should show Salesforce Developer content and clicking the button should set the status text to Ready for interview.

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Salesforce Developer

  • Apex
  • LWC

Preparing...

files.name: style.css
script.js

challenges.aiRubric: Reward semantic HTML, simple DOM selection, event handling, and readable names.

challenges.title: Apex Account Discount Service
challenges.summary: Write an Apex service method that calculates a discount from annual revenue.
challenges.instructions: Create an AccountDiscountService class with a static calculateDiscount(Account acct) method. Return 20 for revenue above 1,000,000, 10 above 250,000, otherwise 0. Handle nulls safely.
challenges.expectedBehavior: Method is static, checks null Account or AnnualRevenue, and returns numeric discount values.

files.name: AccountDiscountService.cls
AccountDiscountServiceTest.cls

challenges.aiRubric: Reward null safety, clean branching, test coverage, with sharing, and interview explanation quality.

challenges.title: Bulk-Safe Contact Count Trigger
challenges.summary: Practice a common trigger scenario: maintain Contact count on Account.
challenges.instructions: Write a Contact trigger and handler that collects AccountIds, uses one aggregate query, and updates Accounts outside loops.
challenges.expectedBehavior: Trigger delegates to a handler, handles insert/update/delete/undelete, avoids SOQL/DML inside loops, and has a test class.

files.name: ContactTrigger.trigger
ContactTriggerHandler.cls
ContactTriggerHandlerTest.cls

challenges.aiRubric: Reward bulkification, handler separation, delete/undelete coverage, aggregate query usage, and test depth.

challenges.title: LWC-Style JavaScript Filter
challenges.summary: Practice JavaScript logic similar to LWC list filtering.
challenges.instructions: Implement filterAccounts(accounts, searchTerm) so it returns accounts whose Name includes the search term case-insensitively.
challenges.expectedBehavior: Function is pure, handles blank search, and does not mutate the original array.

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Account Filter

Run tests to validate the JavaScript function.

files.name: script.js

staticChecks.label: Uses filter or equivalent array processing

challenges.aiRubric: Reward pure function style, null handling, LWC-ready readability, and testability.

challenges.title: Named Credential Integration Client
challenges.summary: Design an Apex callout client using Named Credentials and test mock coverage.
challenges.instructions: Create a service that calls a Named Credential endpoint, handles non-200 responses, and includes HttpCalloutMock-based tests.
challenges.expectedBehavior: Uses callout: named credential syntax, checks status code, deserializes JSON, and has mock tests.

files.name: AccountEnrichmentClient.cls
AccountEnrichmentClientTest.cls

challenges.aiRubric: Reward Named Credential usage, response handling, test mock coverage, and integration failure discussion.

challenges.title: Async Apex Batch Governance
challenges.summary: Practice Batch Apex design for large data updates.
challenges.instructions: Create a Database.Batchable class that scopes Accounts, updates a field in execute, and explains batch size/governance in comments.
challenges.expectedBehavior: Implements Database.Batchable, uses QueryLocator, updates records in execute, and avoids callouts unless explicitly declared.

files.name: AccountHealthBatch.cls

challenges.aiRubric: Reward batchable shape, scope safety, operational monitoring, restartability, and LDV awareness.

challenges.title: Agentforce Architecture Guardrails
challenges.summary: Draft architecture-oriented pseudocode and guardrails for an Agentforce action.
challenges.instructions: Write Apex-like pseudocode for an Agent action that validates user access, grounds data, logs decisions, and escalates unsafe requests.
challenges.expectedBehavior: Mentions CRUD/FLS, sharing, grounding, audit logging, fallback/escalation, and test strategy.

files.name: AgentActionGuardrails.cls

staticChecks.label: Mentions grounding or trusted data retrieval

challenges.aiRubric: Reward governance clarity, Trust Layer awareness, auditability, access control, and production readiness.
